query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `route_history` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `userId` int NOT NULL,
  `fromPostcode` varchar(10) NOT NULL,
  `toPostcode` varchar(10) NOT NULL,
  `label` enum('fastest','cheapest','balanced') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'balanced',
  `summary` varchar(200),
  `totalDurationSecs` int,
  `totalDistanceMetres` int,
  `estimatedCost` decimal(8,2),
  `dominantMode` varchar(20),
  `departureTime` varchar(30),
  `arrivalTime` varchar(30),
  `legsSnapshot` json,
  `shareToken` varchar(64),
  `shareExpiresAt` timestamp NULL,
  `usedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `idx_route_history_userId` (`userId`),
  KEY `idx_route_history_shareToken` (`shareToken`)
);

  `shareExpiresAt` timestamp NULL,

  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `idx_route_history_userId` (`userId`),
  KEY `idx_route_history_shareToken` (`shareToken`)
);
